name: Apple Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a round pan, 9 x 1 1/2 inches.
2. Mix all ingredients except Streusel Topping until moistened.
3. Spread batter in the pan and sprinkle with Streusel Topping.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Serve warm.
6. Mix all ingredients for the Streusel topping until crumbly.
